surfaces.content_card: bg-surface rounded-2xl border border-border/50 shadow-soft p-4 md:p-6 transition-all hover:shadow-medium
surfaces.verse_card: bg-verse-card-bg rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8 border border-secondary/20 shadow-soft relative overflow-hidden

components.navigation: Bottom tab bar for mobile with Phosphor icons (Home, Prayers, Communities, Profile). Fixed glassmorphism header for desktop with logo.

video_feed.layout: Full viewport height containers (h-[calc(100vh-bottom_nav_height)]). Scroll snap mandatory.
video_feed.interactions: Right-aligned action buttons (Like, Comment, Share, Follow) with soft shadows for visibility over video. Bottom-left aligned user info and caption.
video_feed.typography: White text with subtle text-shadow for readability on videos.

components.verse_of_the_day: Premium card utilizing 'Playfair Display' font. Include a subtle background image with low opacity. Needs a clear 'Share' CTA.
components.prayer_requests: List layout using content_card styling. Include 'Prayed' button (changes from gray to secondary color when clicked) and counter. Generous spacing between items.
components.communities: Grid of rounded rectangular cards (aspect ratio 16:9 or 1:1) with background images, gradients, and community names. Include member count.
components.buttons: Primary CTA: bg-primary text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-primary-hover transition-colors. Secondary: bg-secondary text-white rounded-full. Outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary rounded-full.

icons.style: Duotone or Regular weight, providing a modern and accessible look.

video_placeholder_1.description: Golden clouds sunset for video placeholder or feed background

verse_bg.description: Open bible in sunlight for Verse of the Day background

prayer_bg.description: Silhouette of woman praying at sunset

community_bg.description: Beautiful blue sky for community groups banner

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google Fonts 'Playfair Display' and 'Outfit' in the global CSS/HTML.
Build a mobile-first PWA layout. The core experience is mobile, with a bottom navigation bar.
For the TikTok-style video feed, use scroll-snap-type: y mandatory on the container and scroll-snap-align: start on the items. Ensure 100vh calculation accounts for mobile browser bars.
Use Framer Motion for micro-interactions: tap states on buttons, smooth mounting of the verse of the day card, heart animations for likes.
Use Shadcn UI components but heavily customize them: remove sharp Vercel-like borders, add the soft shadows and rounded-2xl corners defined in the surfaces section.
Implement the 'Verse of the Day' as a beautiful, shareable card that can be captured. Use Playfair Display for the verse text.
Prayer requests should have a 'I prayed for this' button that increments a counter and changes color state, providing immediate positive feedback.
Ensure all text over images/videos has proper contrast using gradients or drop shadows.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for testing.
